messages:
## 项目仓库顶层目录结构

### 📁 目录
| 类别 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| **开发配置** | `.cargo/`、`.vscode/`、`.pids/` |
| **核心源码** | `crates/`、`UI/`、`run/`、`rustclaw` |
| **文档说明** | `docs/`、document/`、prompts/` |
| **外部资源** | `external_skills/`、`skills_output/`、`skill_develop/` |
| **系统配置** | `configs/`、`services/`、`systemd/`、`docker/` |
| **数据存储** | `data/`、`migrations/`、`target/` |
| **构建部署** | `build-all.sh`、`docker-compose.yml` 等 |
| **日志与临时** | `logs/`、`tmp/`、`.git/` |

### 📄 文件
| 类别 | 内容 |
|------|------|
| **配置文件** | `.dockerignore`、`.env.example`、`.gitignore`、`rustclaw.service` |
| **说明文档** | `README.md`、`README_cn.md`、`RUSTCLAW_SERVICE_README.md`、`AGENTS.md`、`USAGE.md`、`failed-routing-cases.md` |
| **许可证** | `LICENSE`、`LICENSE.zh-CN.md` |
| **构建脚本** | `build-all.sh`、`build-ui-nginx.sh`、`cross-build-upload.sh`、`package-release.sh` |
| **启动脚本** | `start-*.sh`（共14个：telegramd、wechatd、larkd、feishud等） |
| **停止/管理脚本** | `stop-rustclaw.sh`、`check-logs.sh`、`system_report.sh`、`setup-config.sh` |
| **依赖清单** | `Cargo.lock`、`Cargo.toml`、`package.json`、`package-lock.json` |
| **图片资源** | `RustClaw.png`、`RustClaw480X320.png`、`longxia.png` |
| **其他** | `path_note.txt`、`pwd_report.txt`、`test_contract.sqlite`、`memory-usage-plan.md` |

route_view=false execution_view=true visible_skills=38 resume_context=true binding_context=true force_clarify=false resolved_prompt=列出当前仓库顶层目录和文件，简单分组展示
